-   More
    
    [Documentation](https://api.ziprecruiter.com/mcp/docs)[Privacy Policy](https://www.ziprecruiter.global/en/privacy)[Support](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#33404643435c414773495a4341565041465a4756411d505c5e)
    

Find live jobs on ZipRecruiter without leaving Claude. Search by job title, company, or location, then narrow results by salary, distance, remote or hybrid work, employment type, and date posted. After reviewing a listing, jump to ZipRecruiter to apply.

You can use ZipRecruiter to:

**Find specific jobs in a specific location:**  
"Find software engineer jobs in San Francisco CA"

**Find jobs broadly:**  
"Find jobs near me"

**Find jobs with filters like salary and remote options:**  
"Search for remote UX designer jobs between 80k and 100k"
